title: habal #1891
definition:
1) to act emptily, become vain, be vain
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to become vain
        1a2) to be utterly vain (with cognate acc)
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to cause to become vain
        1b2) to fill with vain hopes
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to become vain

    1b) (Hiphil)

    NASB:  to act emptily, become vain
